name: K2 Gold Corporation
description: K2 Gold Corporation is a junior mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in the western United States, with its flagship Mojave Gold Project covering approximately 5,780 hectares in Inyo County, California. The company also holds the Si2 Project in Nevada and is fully permitted and funded for drill campaigns at both projects. K2 Gold is at the explorer stage, having raised approximately CAD $10.9 million and recently qualified for the OTCQX Best Market in 2026.
